kernel_subject: netdev: reshuffle netif_napi_add() APIs to allow dropping weight
stage1_reason: Direct API change from netif_napi_add() to netif_napi_add_weight() with same parameters, plus header includes for kernel cleanup
stage2_reason: Kernel commit 58caed3dacb4 introduces netif_napi_add_weight() API and reshuffles netif_napi_add() APIs, directly matching driver migration from netif_napi_add() to netif_napi_add_weight() with same parameters as described in stage-1 reason.
